name: express-api-starter
description: A basic starter for an express.js API
author: CJ R. <cj@null.computer> (https://w3cj.now.sh)

scripts.testModel: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/model.test.js 2>&1 | tee logs/testModel.log
scripts.testRep: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/repository.test.js 2>&1 | tee logs/testRep.log
scripts.testModel:ts: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/model.test.js 2>&1 | tee logs/testModel_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log
scripts.testRep:ts: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/repository.test.js 2>&1 | tee logs/testRep_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log
